task.question: When are 2 white knights within 1 square of each other?
initial_trace_steps: At 01:55, I noticed 2 white knights within 1 square of each other for the first time, with 1 at f3 and another at e1, thus being 1 diagonal square away from each other. At 01:57, I saw the white knight at e1 move to g3, but it was still 1 square away from the knight at f3. At 02:49, when the white knight at f3 moves to capture a black pawn at d4, the 2 white knights are now no longer within 1 square from each other. Since there is no other time that 2 white knights are within 1 square of each other, the only time when 2 white knights are within 1 square from each other is at 01:55 - 02:49.
